title: OpenSynaptic Core Adapter Manifest

requiredCommands.name: info
requiredCommands.purpose: Emit adapter identity and implementation metadata.

requiredCommands.name: capabilities
requiredCommands.purpose: Emit supported profiles, roles, and packet capabilities.

requiredCommands.name: run-profile
requiredCommands.purpose: Execute an entire conformance profile against OpenSynaptic Core.

requiredCommands.name: run-cases
requiredCommands.purpose: Execute one or more selected cases from a profile or dataset.

stdout.note: run-profile and run-cases must emit repository-compatible reports.

exitCodes.meaning: Successful execution; report may still contain FAIL status for profile results.
Validation failure or profile failure with report output available.
Adapter execution error or environment fault.

note: This manifest freezes the adapter contract before the concrete adapter command is implemented.
